title: Add /motion to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [/motion](https://motion-e93d3.web.app/) to image
- /motion is a free, open-source generative graphics studio for designing WebGL shader visuals and looping motion backgrounds. It lets users tweak shader parameters, customize palettes, preview visuals

Fixes #12115

gist.headline: Shader Magic
gist.blurb: We just added /motion to the ecosystem! It's a free, open-source generative graphics studio for designing WebGL shader visuals and looping motion backgrounds.
gist.summary: Added `/motion`, an open-source generative graphics studio for designing WebGL shader visuals and looping motion backgrounds, to the community apps directory.
gist.impact: Creators can now discover and use `/motion` to tweak shader parameters, customize palettes, and generate looping visuals directly from the ecosystem.
gist.visual_concept: The PR introduces a WebGL shader and motion graphics studio. The visual should feature Polly the bee acting as a digital artist or VJ, tweaking knobs on a retro console that controls a glowing, swirling, colorful screen representing shader graphics.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, turning knobs on a retro console connected to a glowing CRT monitor. The monitor displays a swirling, colorful WebGL shader pattern. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, turning knobs on a retro console connected to a glowing CRT monitor. The monitor displays a swirling, colorful WebGL shader pattern. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
